description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/nkovacs/docker-builder:latest Docker image and caches the .cache directory. Add a single build job (named build) that runs in the default stage and is limited to the master branch. In the job script, create the .cache/docker and /var/lib/docker directories, copy any cached Docker data from .cache/docker to /var/lib/docker, log in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, build the image registry.gitlab.com/nkovacs/docker_test, push it with the latest tag, and finally copy the Docker data back to .cache/docker for future runs.
